case_title: ISAK RABINOVICH VS. JEREMY CHARLES SETZER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-06-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RABINOVICH, ISAK AS TO DEFENDANT SETZER, JEREMY CHARLES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-03-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-19-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-26-2018 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 62991182)
